tasks.check: deno check packages/*/*/mod.ts packages/foundation/log/compat/pino/mod.ts packages/foundation/log/http/mod.ts packages/data/orm/postgres/mod.ts packages/data/orm/sqlite/mod.ts packages/data/orm/libsql/mod.ts packages/data/orm/turso/mod.ts packages/data/migrate/postgres/mod.ts packages/data/migrate/sqlite/mod.ts packages/data/migrate/libsql/mod.ts packages/data/migrate/turso/mod.ts packages/async/jobs/postgres/mod.ts packages/data/migrate/cli/mod.ts
tasks.examples: deno task examples:check && deno run --allow-env --allow-read --allow-write --allow-ffi --allow-net=github.com,release-assets.githubusercontent.com examples/run_all.ts
tasks.ci: deno task fmt:check && deno task lint && deno task check && deno task graph && deno task docs:check && deno task test && deno task examples
tasks.ci:full: deno task ci && deno task test:coverage && deno task publish:dry
tasks.publish:dry: deno task publish:dry:errors && deno task publish:dry:env && deno task publish:dry:log && deno task publish:dry:testing && deno task publish:dry:http && deno task publish:dry:cache && deno task publish:dry:storage && deno task publish:dry:session && deno task publish:dry:schema && deno task publish:dry:migrate && deno task publish:dry:orm && deno task publish:dry:jobs
